Bash(node -e 'async function test\(\) { const res = await fetch\(""https://www.tiktok.com/@chuplaithanhxuan"", { headers: { ""User-Agent"": ""Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36"", ""Accept"": ""text/html"" } }\); const html = await res.text\(\); const match = html.match\(/<script id=""__UNIVERSAL_DATA_FOR_REHYDRATION__""[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/\); if \(!match\) { console.log\(""No script tag, len:"", html.length\); return; } const json = JSON.parse\(match[1]\); const scope = json[""__DEFAULT_SCOPE__""]; console.log\(""Keys:"", Object.keys\(scope || {}\)\); const ud = scope[""webapp.user-detail""]; if \(ud\) { console.log\(""user:"", ud.userInfo?.user?.nickname\); console.log\(""itemList?"", Array.isArray\(ud.itemList\), ud.itemList?.length\); console.log\(""ud keys:"", Object.keys\(ud\)\); } } test\(\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\);')
